name: Convert Git Commit to Annotated Diff HTML
query: Convert this git commit to HTML: https://github.infra..com/Sense/cml-serving/pull/1373/commits/e8ef85e31335d98b14d864d9363d5cf1d0f40dbb
expected_behavior: Step 1: Parse URL to extract host (github.infra..com), org (Sense), repo (cml-serving), PR (1373), SHA (e8ef85e...)
Step 2: Fetch commit metadata via gh api repos/Sense/cml-serving/commits/e8ef85e... --hostname github.infra..com
Step 3: Fetch diff via gh api with Accept: application/vnd.github.diff header
Step 5: Generate HTML with commit header, per-file diffs, syntax highlighting, stats
Step 7: Report file path to user
success_criteria: Skill activates when user provides a GitHub commit URL
Correctly parses org, repo, and SHA from the URL
Uses gh api with --hostname for GitHub Enterprise URLs
Generated HTML shows annotated diff with line numbers and color coding
Includes commit message, author, date, and file change stats
HTML is self-contained with no external dependencies
